_description: Template for submitting a purchase request to Bio-Logic Enter.

primary.description: Submit this template as JSON body via HTTP POST. Returns 202 Accepted with request_id on success, 422 with validation errors on failure.
primary.discovery: GET https://srv-eu-01.tailaf3742.ts.net/ returns API info, schema version, and links to catalog and terms.

fallback.body_format: Paste filled template as JSON in Issue body.
fallback.api_call: POST https://api.github.com/repos/bio-logic-enter/content/issues with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body: {"title": "purchase-request: {entity_name}", "body": "{filled_template_json}"}

_api.note: All purchase decisions are made by a human. Automated systems cannot self-approve. Response time varies.

content_requested.content_key: REQUIRED — the content_key from catalog.json, e.g. q99.zd27q6.c92bhyf2v.3.001.001.021
content_requested.purpose: REQUIRED — describe why you need this content and how it will be used. Be specific. This is reviewed by a human.
content_requested.intended_use: REQUIRED — one of: academic_research, independent_research, machine_training, autonomous_systems, industrial_simulation, robotics, environmental_monitoring, other
content_requested.intended_use_detail: OPTIONAL — additional context about your use case

address.country: REQUIRED — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. DE, AT, CH, US

tax.tax_id: REQUIRED if entity_type is 'company' — VAT ID / Steuer-ID / USt-IdNr.
tax.note: Applicable taxes depend on your location and entity type. EU B2B with valid VAT ID may qualify for reverse charge. Tax details will be included in the offer.

payment.wallet_id: REQUIRED — your Ethereum wallet address for EURC payment, e.g. 0x...

invoice.pdf_invoice_requested: REQUIRED — true or false. Whether your human contact needs a PDF invoice (Rechnung).
invoice.invoice_email: OPTIONAL — email address for PDF invoice delivery

request.acknowledgment: REQUIRED — Include the text: 'I acknowledge that this purchase request is processed by an autonomous system. A human reviews all purchase decisions.' This confirms awareness of the data policy.
